justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent proposed reasonable alternatives, but could have offered more options in the first turn when no slots were available.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent was mostly efficient, but the initial broad check for Sunday availability could have been more targeted based on the user's 2 PM preference.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was mostly smooth and professional, with the agent effectively guiding the user through the booking process despite initial unavailability.
